deferred_items.item: Qodo R1 #4/#5 — JSONL ID dedup (learning-routes + pending-refinements)
deferred_items.rationale: Data dedup'd in this PR (845→41 / 814→38 lines). Root cause is hook bug — auto-append doesn't dedupe by id. Without hook fix, recurs next session. DEBT-45654 tracks the hook fix.

rejected_items.rationale: Suggestion is technically correct pre-Node 20, but Node 18+ enforces CVE-2024-27980 hardening that REJECTS .cmd/.bat with shell:false (EINVAL on spawn). Verified locally — npm.cmd + shell:false produces EINVAL. Kept original shell:process.platform === 'win32' pattern; added maxBuffer cap and inline rationale for SonarCloud S4036 acknowledgment (PATH search is intentional for npm-style commands; args are hardcoded and untrusted-input-free).

User-confirmed reject (option B). Synchronous audit script with no security boundary between existsSync and any subsequent read; the read is in its own try-block. No exploit window. Qodo's own importance score: 3/10 with 'minimal practical value in this synchronous audit script'.

plan.commit_2: MAJOR bugs + CC refactor + regex DoS + doc-lint fix
